name: Emoji Party
author: Poki
description: Emoji Party is a festive puzzle game where you have to combine different emojis! Test your sharp wits and perception as you progress through different challenges, each one requiring specific order of emoji combinations for you to get the correct outcome. There are countless different scenarios for you to explore, and you can never be sure what the next level's scenario will be! Are you ready to get this party started? How do I play Emoji Party? Click and drag with the mouse to make the correct emoji combinations! Who created Emoji Party? Emoji Party is created by Illusive Games. Play their other games on Poki: Prismo Puzzles , Prismo Coloring , Emoji Coloring and Emoji Puzzles ! How can I play Emoji Party for free? You can play Emoji Party for free on Poki. Can I play Emoji Party on mobile devices and desktop? Emoji Party can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
